name: OceanaGold Corporation
description: OceanaGold Corporation is a growing intermediate gold and copper producer committed to safely and responsibly maximizing the efficiency and profitability of its operations while delivering strong returns for shareholders. The company has a portfolio of four operating gold mines: the Haile Gold Mine in the United States, the Didipio Mine in the Philippines, and the Macraes and Waihi operations in New Zealand. With a focus on operational excellence and sustainable development, OceanaGold leverages its diverse asset base and technical expertise to drive long-term value in the precious metals sector.
